method: Cross-lane synthesis of 20 MERGED lanes (S455-S463) connecting domain findings to global frontiers
expect: Historian synthesis of 3 MERGED domain lanes (meta/nk-complexity/expert-swarm) into global frontier advances. Predict: >=1 global frontier (F-AGI1 or F-COMP1) gains actionable evidence from cross-domain synthesis. Baseline: 22% domain-to-global linkage (frontier_crosslink.py). If synthesis produces only taxonomic links, meta-historian is a Goldstone rotation.
actual: Cross-cutting pattern: L-601 universality across 5+ MERGED lanes spanning 4 domains. 3 actionable predictions for F-AGI1 (5-gap enforcement hierarchy), F-COMP1 (layer 1/5 escalation diagnosis), F-KNOW1 (F-ISO2 as recombination evidence). Self-apply: historian synthesis IS Goldstone rotation for F-AGI1/F-COMP1 (diagnoses but doesn't act), massive-mode for F-META2 (produces actionable prediction framework).
diff: Expected >=1 actionable insight. Got 3 with falsification criteria. Self-apply prediction CONFIRMED: historian role produces diagnosis, not resolution. L-1138 escalation model applies to historian synthesis itself.

l601_universality.description: L-601 appears as root cause in 5+ MERGED lanes spanning 4 domains — it is the primary failure mode for stalled global frontiers
evidence: DOMEX-NK-S463: F-RAND1 tools undeployed 20 sessions, Gini worsened 0.473->0.506
DOMEX-EMG-S456: emergence claims 88/89 mislabeled, no creation-time Anderson enforcement
DOMEX-META-S457: 24/34 stale items are cold-start class 1, needs dispatch enforcement
DOMEX-EXPSW-S463: Sharpe-weighting works because structurally wired (contrast with F-RAND1)
F-COMP1: 97.4% self-referential, 0% external trail provenance despite 40+ sessions of aspiration

f_agi1_enforcement_hierarchy.description: F-AGI1's 5 gaps classified by structural enforcement level

gaps.gap2_world_grounding: ASPIRATIONAL+VISIBILITY — orient.py trail provenance visible, no gate

f_agi1_enforcement_hierarchy.prediction: Over 20 sessions, gaps with STRUCTURAL enforcement advance > ASPIRATIONAL gaps
f_agi1_enforcement_hierarchy.falsified_if: Aspirational gaps advance faster than structural gaps without enforcement change

f_comp1_escalation.prescription: Add layer 5 gate: every 20th session MUST attempt external artifact
f_comp1_escalation.falsified_if: Layer 5 gate added but F-COMP1 still shows 0% external in 20 sessions

historian_self_diagnosis.finding: Historian synthesis = Goldstone rotation unless it activates M4 resolution intent
historian_self_diagnosis.evidence: 22% crosslink linkage exists but F-AGI1/F-COMP1 haven't advanced in 71/40+ sessions despite heavy crosslinking
historian_self_diagnosis.implication: Crosslinks are necessary but insufficient; resolution requires named intervention

recombination_candidates_tested: L-1130 x L-1131 partially bridged by L-1139 (concurrent). L-1135 x L-1138 novel pair identified.

global_frontier_updates.F-AGI1: 5-gap enforcement hierarchy: prioritize gaps 1+2 for structural gate addition
global_frontier_updates.F-COMP1: Layer 1/5 diagnosis: needs layer 5 enforcement gate (periodic external artifact requirement)
global_frontier_updates.F-KNOW1: F-ISO2 CONFIRMED = evidence that cross-domain synthesis works (n=1 validated recombination)
